creator: dym@afalina.od.ua
text:
On a fresh install of the system and only this port, the problem does not appear.

I know of principle "do not mix" :-)
The point is that they are the same file.
Similar behavior when one of the files is a link to another.
I.e., it appears on the same fresh install when creating a soft or hard link.

It seems to me, that it makes sense to select only "primary" files, checking at least that the second file is not a link. So as not links enumeration mix with "real" file.
